0:{"rsc":["$","$1","c",{"children":[[["$","$L2",null,{"as":"h1","children":"Semantic Memory"}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"children":"Structured knowledge storage using a temporal knowledge graph. Stores facts, relationships, and concepts as subject-predicate-object triples with temporal validity."}],"\n",["$","$L2",null,{"as":"h2","children":"TripleStore Class"}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"children":["Semantic Memory is managed by the ",["$","code",null,{"children":"TripleStore"}]," class, which is ",["$","strong",null,{"children":"separate"}]," from the main ",["$","code",null,{"children":"Memory"}]," class. It is not accessed via ",["$","code",null,{"children":"mem.add_fact()"}]," or ",["$","code",null,{"children":"mem.query_facts()"}],"."]}],"\n",["$","$L2",null,{"as":"h3","children":"Module-Level Functions"}],"\n",["$","$L3",null,{"code":"from mnemosyne.semantic import add_triple, query_triples\n\n# Add a triple\nadd_triple(\n  subject=\"Project Alpha\",\n  predicate=\"has_deadline\",\n  object=\"2026-05-01\",\n  confidence=0.90,\n  source=\"user\",\n  valid_from=\"2026-04-25\",\n)\n\n# Query triples\nresults = query_triples(\n  subject=\"Project Alpha\",\n  predicate=\"has_deadline\",\n)\n","language":"python"}],"\n",["$","$L2",null,{"as":"h3","children":"TripleStore Instance"}],"\n",["$","$L3",null,{"code":"from mnemosyne.semantic import TripleStore\n\nts = TripleStore(db_path=\"mnemosyne.db\")\n\n# Add a triple\nts.add(\n  subject=\"Alice\",\n  predicate=\"prefers_language\",\n  object=\"Go\",\n  confidence=0.95,\n  source=\"user\",\n  valid_from=\"2026-04-20\",\n)\n\n# Query triples\nresults = ts.query(\n  subject=\"Alice\",\n  predicate=\"prefers_language\",\n)\n\n# Temporal query — what was true as of a specific date?\nresults = ts.query(\n  subject=\"Alice\",\n  predicate=\"prefers_language\",\n  as_of=\"2026-03-01\",\n)\n","language":"python"}],"\n",["$","$L2",null,{"as":"h2","children":"Triple Schema"}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"children":"Each triple has the following fields:"}],"\n",["$","table",null,{"children":[["$","thead",null,{"children":["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","th",null,{"children":"Field"}],["$","th",null,{"children":"Type"}],["$","th",null,{"children":"Description"}]]}]}],["$","tbody",null,{"children":[["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"subject"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"TEXT"}],["$","td",null,{"children":["Entity (e.g., ",["$","code",null,{"children":"\"Alice\""}],")"]}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"predicate"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"TEXT"}],["$","td",null,{"children":["Relationship (e.g., ",["$","code",null,{"children":"\"knows\""}],")"]}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"object"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"TEXT"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Target confidence"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"source"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"TEXT"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Origin of this triple"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"valid_from"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"TEXT/ISO date"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"When the fact became true"}]]}]]}]]}],"\n",["$","$L2",null,{"as":"h2","children":"Example Alpha"}],["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"has_deadline"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"2026-05-01"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"0.90"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":"Bob"}],["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"reports_to"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Carol"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"0.85"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":"API parameter in ","$L4"," enables point-in-time queries. Only triples whose ","$L5"," is on or before the specified date are returned. This lets you ask \"what did we know at time X?\""]}],"\n","$L6","\n","$L7","\n","$L8","\n","$L9","\n","$La"],["$Lb"],"$Lc"]}],"isPartial":false,"staleTime":300,"varyParams":null,"buildId":"rL0kYsxstwPZl4oDnLrmK"}

6:["$","$L3",null,{"code":"# What did we know about Project Alpha's deadline on April 1?\nresults = ts.query(\n  subject=\"Project Alpha\",\n  predicate=\"has_deadline\",\n  as_of=\"2026-04-01\",\n)\n","language":"python"}]

Predicates are free-form strings. This allows dynamic knowledge domains without schema migrations."}]}]]}]]}]}]
a:["$","div",null,{"className":"callout callout-warning","children":["$","div",null,{"className":"flex items-start gap-3","children":[["$","$Ld",null,{"iconNode":[["path",{"d":"m21.73 18-8-14a2 2 0 0 0-3.48 0l-8 14A2 2 0 0 0 4 21h16a2 2 0 0 0 1.73-3","key":"wmoenq"}],["path",{"d":"M12 9v4","key":"juzpu7"}],["path",{"d":"M12 17h.01","key":"p32p05"}]],"className":"lucide-triangle-alert shrink-0 mt-0.5","size":18}],["$","div",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"className":"block mb-1","children":"No Auto-Extraction"}],["$","div",null,{"className":"text-sm leading-relaxed","children":["$","p",null,{"children":["Triple extraction from Working Memory during consolidation is ",["$","strong",null,{"children":"not"}]," currently implemented.
